HIGH RISK.summary: WARNING: This application exhibits HIGH-RISK behaviour consistent with financial fraud malware. It requests dangerous SMS and internet permissions typically used to intercept banking OTPs.
HIGH RISK.fir_note: Immediate forensic escalation recommended. Attach this report to FIR as technical evidence.

MEDIUM RISK.summary: CAUTION: Suspicious permission combinations detected. Manual review by a forensic analyst is advised before filing.
MEDIUM RISK.fir_note: Submit for secondary review. Flag case for follow-up analysis.

LOW RISK.summary: CLEAR: No high-risk indicators detected. Application appears safe based on static analysis.
